'''Chainly''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who assisted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on his mission to [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]<ref name="Tangled Web" /> in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> They tried to track down the slicer [[Astri Oddo]] Divinian who was only known under the name "[[Quintus Farel]]." When Chainly and<ref name="Tangled Web" /> his<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] team finally discovered Astri's the secret hiding place they unexpectedly encountered the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Fy-Tor-Ana]] who protected her and her son [[Lune Oddo Divinian]]. Chainly later reported to Vader that [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] were used against his men during the confrontation, increasing Vader's mistrust of Ferus Olin even more.<ref name="Tangled Web" />
